descriptionHtml:
About Finom

Finom is a European tech startup headquartered in Amsterdam, and we’re on a journey towards revolutionizing the financial landscape for entrepreneurs worldwide. Our mission is to develop an all-in-one financial B2B solution that integrates banking functions, accounting, financial management, and invoicing into a seamless, mobile-first platform.

We recently closed a €115 million Series C equity round (around $133 million), bringing our total funding to approximately $346 million. This significant investment follows a $105 million growth funding round from General Catalyst, a long-term backer since 2021 known for supporting companies like Airbnb, HubSpot, KAYAK, and Stripe.

Finom's platform goes beyond traditional banking, offering invoicing and a growing suite of features, including AI-enabled accounting, aiming to simplify financial management for entrepreneurs. We're actively expanding our reach across key EU markets like Germany, France, the Netherlands, Italy, and Spain.

At Finom, we’re not just redefining the entrepreneurial experience — we’re empowering our employees to make a real difference. Your work matters, and your impact extends far beyond product metrics. We nurture innovation and an inspiring work environment where bold ideas thrive, prioritizing thorough research, swift implementation of solutions, and ensuring that every effort we make benefits our users, employees, partners, and our business as a whole.

Maintaining our start-up spirit, we prioritize thorough research, swift implementation of solutions, and ensuring that every effort we make benefits our users, employees, partners, and, of course, our business.

About The Role

We are searching for a strategic and experienced Lead Product Manager to take ownership of our Financial Crime Risk Management (FCRM) domain. This is a high-impact leadership role where you will define the future of how Finom ensures trust and safety at scale. You will be responsible for the product strategy and execution across customer onboarding (KYC/KYB), transaction monitoring, fraud prevention, and sanctions screening.Your mission is to build a best-in-class FCRM platform that not only protects Finom and our customers but also serves as a competitive advantage. You will lead the charge in balancing robust risk mitigation with the seamless, user-centric experience our customers love. This role requires a visionary leader who can navigate complex regulatory landscapes and translate them into elegant, effective, and scalable product solutions that enable our rapid growth across Europe.

What You’ll Do

  • Own and drive the end-to-end product strategy and roadmap for the entire FCRM domain, including KYC/KYB, transaction monitoring, fraud prevention, and internal tooling.
  • Lead a dedicated, cross-functional team of engineers, designers, data scientists, and compliance specialists to deliver innovative risk management solutions.
  • Serve as the domain expert on financial crime, translating complex regulatory requirements (like AMLD and PSD2) and emerging fraud trends into a coherent, scalable product strategy.
  • Champion a user-first mindset within the risk domain, designing intelligent, automated, and transparent experiences that minimize friction for legitimate customers while deterring bad actors.
  • Define, own, and analyze the key metrics and OKRs for customer trust, fraud rates, operational efficiency, and the overall health of our FCRM platform.
  • Build and optimize the internal tools that empower our AML and Fraud Operations teams, including investigation dashboards, case management systems, and alert-handling interfaces.
  • Collaborate closely with senior leadership and key stakeholders in Legal, Compliance, and Operations to ensure product solutions align with regulatory obligations and business goals.
  • Proactively identify emerging threats and opportunities in the RegTech and FinCrime space, driving innovation to keep Finom ahead of the curve.
  • Mentor other product managers and contribute to a culture of product excellence, data-driven decision-making, and customer obsession across the organization.

Who You Are

  • You have 7+ years of product management experience, with a proven track record of launching and scaling successful products in fintech, B2B SaaS, or platform companies.
  • You have deep domain expertise in one or more areas of Financial Crime, such as AML, KYC/KYB, transaction monitoring, fraud detection, or sanctions screening.
  • You are a strategic thinker who can balance long-term vision with pragmatic, iterative execution in a fast-paced, high-growth environment.
  • You are customer-obsessed and passionate about building intuitive, low-friction experiences, even within highly complex and regulated domains.
  • You excel at stakeholder management and communication, capable of articulating complex risk trade-offs and product rationale to diverse audiences, from engineers to executives.
  • You are highly analytical and data-driven, with a strong ability to define metrics, interpret data, and use insights to guide your product strategy.
  • You thrive on untangling complex regulatory and technical challenges and transforming them into simple, scalable, and effective solutions.
  • You have extensive experience leading cross-functional teams and can inspire and align them behind a common vision.

Nice to Have

  • Experience with products serving multiple European markets and familiarity with various regulatory frameworks (e.g., AMLD5/6, PSD2).
  • Experience in a high-growth startup/scaleup environment.
  • Background or close collaboration with data science and machine learning teams to build risk models or automation.
  • Experience with managing third-party risk technology vendors and integrations.
  • Experience with B2B or SME-facing financial products.

Hiring Process:

📞 HR Interview (30 minutes) – An initial conversation to learn more about your experience, motivation, and expectations.

🧠 Product Craft Interview (60 minutes) – A deep-dive into your product thinking, problem-solving approach, and past cases.

📝 Take-Home Assignment – A task designed to evaluate your product sense, strategic thinking, and communication skills.

📊 Final Interview & Assignment Presentation (60 minutes) – A discussion with the CPO and hiring manager where you’ll present your assignment and walk through your decisions.

🤝 Cultural Fit Interview (60 minutes) – A conversation with potential teammates to assess collaboration style and team fit.

What You Will Get In Return

Make a genuine impact on the product

Join our upward trajectory, and grow with us. We provide the resources and opportunities for continuous personal and professional development, empowering you to make a genuine impact on our evolving product.

Work in the EU

Embark on this exciting journey with us and enjoy the flexibility of traveling and working remotely or in a hybrid model across Europe.

Become a stock options holder

Unlock your inner entrepreneur and align your aspirations with ours through our Stock Options Program. This exciting opportunity is available to every team member, from junior team members to our founders.

Receive unwavering support and care

Finom stands by you at every step, embodying our commitment to your well-being and success reflected in our modern, friendly, and eco-conscious corporate culture. We offer constant support and care to ensure your Finom experience is successful and fulfilling.

Work & Swim program

Immerse yourself in our exclusive Work & Swim Program. Spend one month in a comfortable corporate apartment in enchanting Cyprus. It's the ideal opportunity to strike the perfect work-life balance while enjoying breathtaking Mediterranean views.

Equal Opportunity Statement

At Finom, we're an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. We embrace diversity and invite applications from all walks of life. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, disability status, or other applicable legally protected characteristics.

companyDescription:
Our mission is to enable freelancers and entrepreneurs to get the best insurance at the best price. Insurance that is fair, fast and flexible. And above all, insurance that is tailored to your needs. All at the touch of a button.   

Insify today serves thousands of customers across Europe. As we grow, we’ll continue disrupting and changing the market. Restoring trust by providing freelancers with insurance that can be relied on. Zero paperwork. No long contracts. Just super-fast, 100% online insurance, whenever and wherever they need it.
companySlogan: Insurance that keeps you and your business going.
descriptionHtml:
About Insify

Insify is building the next generation of business insurance — one that’s fully digital, AI-native, and actually works for the entrepreneurs powering our economy. While personal insurance has embraced digital transformation, business insurance is still stuck in the dark ages: clunky forms, human bottlenecks, and outdated risk models. For self-employed professionals and SMEs, that means poor coverage, opaque pricing, and slow service — when speed and trust matter most.

We’re here to fix that by fundamentally rewiring how insurance for freelancers and small businesses is built and delivered. Insify is an AI-first insurtech, applying advanced models across the entire value chain — from intelligent underwriting and dynamic pricing to automated claims and fraud detection. Our approach isn’t just digital; it’s predictive, scalable, and designed for real-time decision-making.

We’re a well-funded, fast-growing scale-up based in Amsterdam, backed by top-tier investors including Accel, Munich Re Ventures, Visionaries Club, and Frontline Ventures. With a high-performing team of 65 and a proven model, we’ve built a platform that powers digital insurance for tens of thousands of entrepreneurs across Europe — and we’re just getting started.

This is your chance to build the insurance experience that freelancers and SME's truly deserve. Creating customer-centric products with real impact by solving hard product problems in a regulated environment. If you’re driven by data, complexity, and the chance to reshape a $5 trillion industry with modern tech — let’s talk.

How we work

At Insify, we’re building more than just an insurance company—we’re creating a culture that’s bold, caring, and built to make a real difference. Everything we do is driven by our core values: grit, impact, care, and entrepreneurship.

We show up with passion and perseverance. We solve real problems and put people first—especially our customers. And we’re always looking for smarter, faster, more human ways to do things.

That’s also why we’ve chosen a pro-office approach. We believe that working together, face to face, sparks creativity, builds stronger teams, and helps us learn faster—especially for new joiners. From spontaneous brainstorms to shared lunches, being in the same space makes the magic happen.

Joining Insify means being part of a team that truly backs each other and the entrepreneurs we serve. If you’re ready to grow, innovate, and help reshape the insurance industry from the inside out—we’d love to meet you.

Product Team

We’re a passionate group of problem solvers who believe in creating products that truly make a difference. At Insify, our product team is at the heart of innovation, working together to design solutions that simplify and enhance the customer experience. From brainstorming new ideas to launching successful products, we focus on building things that matter, backed by data and user feedback.

Whether it’s optimising existing features or developing new ones, we collaborate closely with our tech, insurance, marketing, and operations teams to bring our vision to life. Our team includes product managers, designers, data experts, and insurance specialists —all working hand in hand to craft products that delight our users and scale our business.

What You'll Be Doing

As the Product Manager for the Product Configuration Platform, you are the key driver behind how new insurance products are built into our core back-office platform — GRID — and into our customer-facing flows. You’ll partner with engineering to ensure new products are implemented correctly and lead the transformation toward a ‘self-serve’, configurable platform that allows the insurance team to independently launch and maintain new insurance products.

You are a strategic product manager who connects a long-term platform vision to a concrete, phased delivery plan. You’re someone who builds scalable systems, not just features—adept at simplifying complexity and making thoughtful trade-offs between speed, quality, and scope.

In Particular, You Will

  • Translate complex insurance product specs into structured, actionable platform requirements.
  • Collaborate with the GRID PM to ensure reliable, accurate, and scalable implementation of new insurance products in GRID, and work with the Funnel PM to ensure correct exposure in customer-facing funnels.
  • Lead the long-term effort to make the product implementation process radically more efficient, driving the vision and roadmap toward a platform where the insurance team can configure and launch new products without engineering involvement.
  • Identify patterns across product implementations and lead efforts to turn them into scalable templates or modules, developing frameworks that unify how coverages, pricing logic, and other product elements are handled.
  • Define standards for how insurance products are modeled in the platform, ensuring thorough validation of newly implemented products before launch and owning documentation and governance.

What You'll Need

  • Strategic & Outcome-Oriented Roadmapping: A track record of developing comprehensive delivery plans that go beyond feature lists to include clear phases, milestones, and dependencies. You excel at articulating the 'why' behind your plan and justifying trade-offs.
  • Pragmatic Platform Vision: Adept at translating high-level goals like 'no-code transformation' into a practical, incremental strategy. You understand the realities of building a true self-serve platform as an iterative journey, not a single project.
  • Deep Technical & Domain Abstraction: The ability to translate deep insurance logic into a common framework and canonical data models. You can design systems that handle diverse product structures (pricing, underwriting, eligibility) in a standardized way.
  • User-Centric Internal Tooling: Experience building internal tools for non-technical users, with the ability to design intuitive configuration frameworks that empower teams like Insurance and Ops while maintaining strong guardrails.
  • Clear Communication & Justification: Clarity in presenting complex technical concepts to both technical and non-technical stakeholders. Your recommendations are grounded in data and well-justified assumptions.
  • Exceptional Collaboration & Delivery: Experience navigating complexity, driving trade-off decisions, and ensuring the long-term maintainability of platform components. You are expected to own the delivery roadmap and effectively manage scope.

What we offer

Competitive compensation - we want to attract and retain the best so we are offering a compensation package that aligns with that.

Pension plan - participation to Insify’s Pension Plan, with 6% employer contribution.

Travel reimbursement - we help travelers with their commute.

Hybrid - Possibility to work from home two times a week.

25 holidays days per year - (+ extra day on Christmas eve if it’s a weekday!)

Subscription to Alleo - 50 EUR (net) monthly (cumulable) budget to spend on what you like - anything from gym memberships to UberEats!

Company events - Monthly team drinks, quarterly offsites, lunch and learns, parties, merch and FUN!

Company Macbook - get the best laptop to get your job done in no time!

Quickly develop your career - there’s no better place to develop. We are growing and you can grow with us! Inhouse leadership programs and coaching

High degree of autonomy - it’s time to ACTUALLY make an impact!

companyDescription:
Happening is the technology engine powering Superbet Group's global platforms and brands that bring thrill to customers across the world every day.

We are a game-changing tech company rewriting the rules of sports betting and gaming. We are shaking up the status quo by building our own end-to-end tech stack, solving deep and complex challenges for millions of customers and shaping our culture to work uniquely for the tech community.

A true challenger, our technology handles serious scale on par with the Big Techs, and customer obsession runs through every team. Building our own platform gives us freedom to innovate and flip the legacy perceptions and industry stereotypes.
companySlogan: Rewriting the rules of sports betting & gaming
descriptionHtml:
We’re looking for an experienced engineering leader to support the Machine Learning, Research and ML Ops group, which is at the forefront of driving innovation and delivering impactful solutions for Superbet’s customers. By combining cutting-edge applied machine learning, foundational research, and seamless ML operations, the team harnesses data to revolutionize the online gambling and sports betting experience. From predictive analytics and personalization to fraud detection and real-time recommendations, the group transforms complex data into actionable insights that enhance customer engagement, trust, and satisfaction.

The teams also ensure that deploying and maintaining machine learning models in production is streamlined, scalable, and efficient. This enables the company to experiment rapidly, iterate confidently, and deliver value at speed. By leveraging machine learning to create smarter systems and deeper customer understanding, the group plays a pivotal role in shaping the future of the company, fostering a data-driven culture, and ensuring we deliver unparalleled experiences to our players.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Leadership & Management:
    • Lead and mentor 3+ teams of talented data scientists, ML engineers, software engineers, and managers, providing guidance and support in their day-to-day activities.
    • Oversee the execution, recruitment, development, growth and performance of the machine learning team.
    • Foster a collaborative and innovative team environment while building strong partnerships with product management and stakeholders
  • Project Management:
    • Manage and prioritise machine learning and ML platform projects to align with business goals and objectives.
    • Ensure timely delivery of high-quality machine learning solutions.
    • Coordinate with cross-functional teams to integrate machine learning models into production systems.
  • Technical Expertise:
    • Design, develop, and deploy advanced machine learning models to solve complex business problems.
    • Stay updated with the latest trends and advancements in machine learning and AI technologies.
    • Conduct code reviews and ensure best practices in model development and deployment.
  • Collaboration:
    • Communicate effectively with stakeholders to understand their needs and translate them into actionable machine-learning projects.
    • Present findings and insights to senior management and other stakeholders.
  • Strategic Planning:
    • Develop and implement strategies for building and scaling machine learning solutions.
    • Drive the long-term vision and roadmap for machine learning capabilities at Superbet.
    • Identify opportunities for innovation and improvement in existing processes and systems.
Qualifications:

  • Master’s or Ph.D. in Computer Science, Data Science, Machine Learning, or a related field.
  • Proven experience (5+ years) in machine learning and data science roles.
  • Proven experience (5+ years) leading/managing engineering teams, supporting the growth and performance of engineers and managers
  • Strong programming skills in Python and experience with deep learning frameworks such as TensorFlow, PyTorch, or JAX.
  • Experience with cloud computing platforms primarily AWS and containerisation technologies (e.g., Docker, Kubernetes).
  • Demonstrated experience in leading and managing technical teams.
  • Excellent problem-solving skills and the ability to work independently and collaboratively.
  • Strong communication and interpersonal skills.

Preferred Qualifications:

  • Experience in the gaming or entertainment industry.
  • Proven experience (5+ years) leading/managing an engineering organization made of up engineers and managers, supporting their growth and performance
  • Knowledge of MLOps and experience in deploying machine learning models in production.
  • Experience working with tools and technologies such as Spark, Snowflake, Qwak, MLFlow, Airflow, etc.
  • Contributions to open-source AI/ML projects or participation in AI/ML competitions (e.g., Kaggle).
  • Experience with training and fine-tuning large-scale foundation models (e.g., GPT, BERT, T5) for various tasks.
  • Publications in top AI conferences, such as AAAI, IJCAI, NeurIPS, ICML, ICLR.

What We Offer:

  • Competitive salary and comprehensive benefits package.
  • Opportunity to work on cutting-edge AI/ML projects with real-world impact.
  • Collaborative and inclusive work environment with opportunities for professional growth and development.
  • Flexible work arrangements and remote work options.
  • Access to state-of-the-art tools, resources, and computing infrastructure.

companyDescription:
We are Uber. The go-getters. The kind of people who are relentless about our mission to help people go anywhere and get anything and earn their way. Movement is what we power. It’s our lifeblood. It runs through our veins. It’s what gets us out of bed each morning. It pushes us to constantly reimagine how we can move better. For you. For all the places you want to go. For all the things you want to get. For all the ways you want to earn. Across the entire world. In real time. At the incredible speed of now.

The idea for Uber was born on a snowy night in Paris in 2008, and ever since then our DNA of reimagination and reinvention carries on. We’ve grown into a global platform powering flexible earnings and the movement of people and things in ever expanding ways. We’ve gone from connecting rides on 4 wheels to 2 wheels to 18-wheel freight deliveries. From takeout meals to daily essentials to prescription drugs to just about anything you need at any time and earning your way. From drivers with background checks to real-time verification, safety is a top priority every single day. At Uber, the pursuit of reimagination is never finished, never stops, and is always just beginning.
descriptionHtml:
About The Role

The Earner Financials group is a foundational part of Uber's Earner organization. Our mission is to enable Uber to be the most reliable and rewarding earnings platform for drivers and couriers across the globe. This organization spans four mission-critical verticals:

  • Earnings : To provide earners with clear, consistent, and easily accessible data and visibility into their earnings, performance metrics, and financial status. Help drivers understand their earnings, and strategize on mechanisms to improve their earnings.
  • Benefits : A growing portfolio of benefits such as Earning Guarantees, Accrual Benefits and 3rd Party Benefits that Uber provides to the gig workers.
  • Subscription : To offer earner-facing subscription products, such as Drive Pass which provide benefits like 0% service fees, and enable earners to evaluate the effectiveness of their subscription through relevant metrics.
  • Tipping : Experiences that foster appreciation from riders and eaters to earners.

We are seeking a Senior Staff Engineer (L6) to lead the technical direction and architecture across all verticals in the Earner Financials space. You will be the technical voice for systems that are under intense regulatory scrutiny , responsible for ensuring absolute accuracy , auditability , compliance , and resilience . You'll be driving engineering direction in one of the most sensitive and high-stakes domains at Uber. As a Senior Staff Engineer, you will be directly responsible for multiple projects from inception to production readiness and will define and deliver on the goals and technical direction within the organization with a sense of urgency. You will be expected to foresee architectural problems and opportunities the organization will face a year out and work with engineering leadership to address them proactively.

What The Candidate Will Need / Bonus Points

 What the Candidate Will Do

  • Architect the future of Earner Financial systems: designing reliable, scalable, and extensible financial platforms that ensure transactional integrity, compliance with local/global regulations, and real-time transparency.
  • Own and drive the long-term technical strategy across Earner Financials verticals, identifying systemic opportunities and preempting architectural risks before they become bottlenecks.
  • Lead cross-functional efforts in collaboration with engineering managers, engineering leads, data science, product design, product management, legal, policy and operations teams to translate regulatory requirements and business rules into scalable engineering solutions.
  • Define and raise engineering standards in observability, reliability, SLOs, incident response, testing, and security . Ensuring mission-critical systems remain performant and correct under all conditions.
  • Mentor, coach, and multiply : proactively mentor senior engineers and influence teams across the broader Earner organization, fostering a culture of simplicity, technical rigor, and business alignment.
  • Champion compliance and audit readiness by embedding regulatory guarantees into the core architecture of our financial stack.
  • Drive execution of large-scale, multi-quarter projects , directly influencing technical roadmaps across multiple engineering teams.
  • Consistently write and document high-quality code to solve strategically important problems; improve, role model, and promote coding best practices; lead organization-wide development and adoption of key frameworks.

Basic Qualifications

  • 12+ years of software engineering experience, with significant tenure in architecting large-scale distributed systems .
  • Deep expertise in designing transactional systems that are correct, auditable, and resilient under regulatory requirements.
  • Deep understanding of software engineering principles and backend technologies (e.g., Java, Go).
  • Track record of leading cross-org technical strategies , defining architectural vision, and delivering large, complex systems into production.
  • Experience leading org-wide reliability and observability initiatives, including definition and management of SLOs, SLIs, and error budgets.
  • Excellent communication skills : able to translate complex technical concepts to diverse stakeholders, including non-engineering audiences.
  • Demonstrated ability to lead org-wide engineering projects through all lifecycle stages, including idea inception, stakeholder engagement, collaboration, requirements gathering, design, balancing priorities, implementation, productionization, and operations.

Preferred Qualifications

  • Experience working in or adjacent to compliance-heavy domains (e.g., payments, banking, insurance, or healthcare).
  • Proven history of passing regulatory audits or operating under strict financial controls (e.g., SOX, SOC2, FedRamp, PCI-DSS, GDPR).
  • Contributions to internal engineering frameworks or external technical communities.
  • Demonstrated success in engineering leadership within multi-stakeholder environments.
  • Experience in defining and promoting architecture best practices within an organization.

Bonus / Nice to Have

  • Familiarity with Generative AI, LLMs, or ML-based infrastructure: especially applications in compliance automation, anomaly detection, or predictive analytics.
  • Hands-on experience integrating AI/ML systems in financial applications (e.g., fraud detection, adaptive pricing, earnings prediction, personalized earnings insights).
  • Deep interest in leveraging AI responsibly in regulated environments.

descriptionHtml:
Word de drijvende kracht achter moderne backend-systemen bij toonaangevende organisaties.


Sytac is een privaat ontwikkelhuis met een team van 100 senior engineers. Onze mensen maken dagelijks het verschil bij bedrijven als KLM, BOL, Albert Heijn, IKEA, ING en vele anderen. Als Senior Kotlin Engineer word je onderdeel van deze krachtige community van tech consultants die schaalbare en high-performance backends bouwen voor sectoren als e-commerce, fintech, luchtvaart, overheid en de energiesector.


Over de rol

Als Senior Engineer gespecialiseerd in Kotlin ontwerp, implementeer en optimaliseer je moderne backend-architecturen die miljoenen gebruikers ondersteunen. Je werkt met technologieën als Kotlin, Java, Spring Boot, Kafka en Kubernetes om gedistribueerde, cloud-native microservices te ontwikkelen die toekomstbestendig zijn.

Samen met je team creëer je innovatieve functionaliteiten en duurzame architecturen, waarbij je optreedt als ontwikkelaar, technisch consultant én trusted advisor voor onze klanten.


Wat voor projecten kun je verwachten?

Je werkt mee aan projecten met echte impact bij organisaties die vooroplopen in hun sector.

Denk aan:

  • Luchtvaart – Real-time platforms voor bagageverwerking, crew scheduling of passagiersservices.
  • Retail & E-commerce – High-performance recommendation engines, loyaltysystemen en miljoenenverkeer aan API’s.
  • Banking & Fintech – Robuuste backendoplossingen voor o.a. KYC-processen, risk engines of fraudedetectie.
  • Overheid – Schaalbare portalen en services voor burgers, vergunningen en beleidsuitvoering.
  • Energiesector – Backendoplossingen voor smart grids, energiehandel, verduurzaming en predictive maintenance.


Voorbeelden van werkzaamheden:

  • Ontwerpen en bouwen van microservices met Kotlin en Spring Boot in cloud-omgevingen (AWS, GCP, Azure).
  • Ontwikkelen van high-throughput API’s en backend services voor platforms in finance, retail of luchtvaart.
  • Bouwen van event-driven systemen met Kafka, Akka of Spark voor real-time dataverwerking.
  • Integreren van CI/CD pipelines en observability-oplossingen in productieomgevingen.
  • Samenwerken met frontend-, data- en platform engineers aan end-to-end oplossingen.


Naast je rol als engineer ben je ook een strategische technische partner die klanten helpt innoveren en groeien.


Wat jij meebrengt – jouw kracht als consultant

  • Je volgt de laatste backend-trends en past moderne Kotlin-praktijken toe.
  • Je bouwt systemen die betrouwbaar, modulair en schaalbaar zijn.
  • Je begeleidt teams en stimuleert technische groei.
  • Je verbindt technische keuzes met waarde voor de klant en de business.


Technische skills

  • 5+ jaar ervaring in backend engineering met Kotlin, Java en Spring Boot.
  • Sterke ervaring met microservices en distributed system design.
  • Ervaren met cloudplatforms (AWS, GCP of Azure).
  • Bekend met CI/CD tooling, Git workflows en DevOps-principes.
  • Hands-on ervaring met Docker en Kubernetes.
  • Ervaring met messaging en streamingplatforms (Kafka, Akka, Spark).
  • Goede kennis van zowel SQL als NoSQL databases (MongoDB, Cassandra).
  • Affiniteit met open-source en community-driven development.
  • Vloeiend in Engels (Nederlands is een pré).
  • Bachelor of Master in Software Engineering, Computer Science of vergelijkbaar.


Wat je van ons kunt verwachten

  • Een rol met veel autonomie, afwisseling en strategische invloed.
  • Projecten bij A-merken, met de zekerheid van een vast dienstverband.
  • Een team van senior engineers als sparringpartners.
  • Coaching en groeiruimte, ook richting tech-lead, architect of chapter lead.
  • Kantoor in hartje Haarlem en Amsterdam (Jordaan), met regelmatige meetups, events en (BBQ-)workshops.
  • Boven marktconform salaris + 8% vakantiegeld.
  • Bonusregeling per succesvolle plaatsing.
  • 25 vakantiedagen + nationale feestdagen.
  • Jaarlijkse ski-trip!
  • Volledige reiskostenvergoeding (NS Business Card, leaseauto of km-vergoeding).
  • Pensioenregeling, laptop/telefoon naar keuze, fietsregeling en opleidingsbudget.

descriptionHtml:
Become the driving force behind scalable backend innovation.


Sytac is a privately owned development house with a team of 150 senior engineers. Our people make a daily impact at companies like KLM, BOL, Albert Heijn, IKEA, ING, and many more. As a Senior Backend Java Engineer, you’ll join this powerful community of tech consultants building scalable, cloud-native systems across industries such as aviation, retail, government, energy, and fintech.


About the role

As a Senior Backend Engineer, you’ll design and build high-performance backend services using Java, Kotlin, and Spring Boot. You’ll lead by example, mentor engineers, and bridge technical challenges with business needs. With expertise in Azure cloud, microservices, and event-driven systems, you’ll play a key role in shaping mission-critical applications that support millions of users.


What kind of projects can you expect?

You’ll work on impactful projects that drive digital transformation, for example:

  • Aviation – Real-time crew management, flight scheduling, and passenger systems.
  • Retail & E-commerce – High-traffic microservices powering promotions, payments, and personalization.
  • Banking & Fintech – Secure, compliant platforms for KYC, fraud detection, and risk engines.
  • Government – Scalable citizen portals and digital services using modern cloud practices.
  • Energy – Distributed platforms for smart grids, trading systems, and sustainable infrastructure.


How you’ll add value

  • Development – Design and implement microservices with Java/Kotlin and Spring Boot.
  • Cloud – Build and scale apps on Azure App Services, Blob Storage, Key Vault.
  • Event-Driven Systems – Leverage Kafka for resilient, distributed integrations.
  • IaC – Implement automated environments with ARM templates or Terraform.
  • CI/CD Excellence – Ensure efficient and high-quality delivery pipelines.
  • Leadership – Mentor engineers, foster collaboration, and guide architectural decisions.
  • Collaboration – Work with cross-functional teams to align technology with business needs.


Technical skills

  • 8+ years of backend development with Java and Kotlin.
  • Advanced in Spring Boot and JVM ecosystems.
  • Strong knowledge of Azure cloud (AWS/GCP is a plus).
  • Experience with event-driven architectures (Kafka).
  • Skilled in Infrastructure as Code (ARM templates, Terraform).
  • Deep knowledge of CI/CD pipelines and SDLC best practices.
  • Experience with Docker, Kubernetes, and distributed systems.
  • Database experience (SQL & NoSQL).
  • Passion for mentoring, leading teams, and solving complex problems.


What you can expect from us

  • Projects with A-list brands, with the stability of permanent employment.
  • A role with technical depth, autonomy, and leadership opportunities.
  • A community of 150 senior engineers to learn and grow with.
  • Clear growth paths toward Lead Engineer or Architect.
  • Competitive salary + 7.7% BeFrank pension (3.85% employer contribution).
  • 25 vacation days + Sytac Days (conferences, certifications).
  • €2.400 annual training budget, €500 tech starter budget, €30/month WFH allowance.
  • Bike lease (50% covered) & car lease options.
  • Full commuting reimbursement (NS Business Card or €0.23/km).
  • Tech events, BBQs, sports, ski trips, and more.
  • Dutch classes to help integrate into the culture.
  • Referral bonus up to €5.000 per hire.

companySlogan: Combining a best-in-class travel agency & proprietary fintech to help users travel better — and partners earn more.
descriptionHtml:
About The Job

Hopper Technology Solutions (HTS) Checkout combines market-leading payment services, best-in-class fraud detection, and digital wallet capabilities to enhance the travel experience for users and drive revenue for partners. Our hosted checkout solution offers global coverage and currency support, a comprehensive suite of payment methods, industry-leading anti-fraud technology, and an integrated wallet designed to boost loyalty.

We are seeking a frontend software engineer with expertise in building high-quality web applications from the ground up. As part of a cross-functional team of exceptional engineers and product managers, you will develop new features and provide best-in-class support to help our partners scale their businesses.

Tech Stack

  • Our frontend will be web apps using React + TypeScript, and you will play a large part in evolving this
  • Our backend systems are written in Scala, and we use a suite of GCP services

What Would Your Day-to-day Look Like

  • Design, build and review code for our HTS Checkout web frontend
  • Operate autonomously but work closely with your fellow engineers as well as PM to ensure high alignment
  • Explore engineering improvements for the team and the product
  • Collaborate cross-functionally with the product team and other Hopper teams
  • Our group operates with very few meetings and emphasizes strong alignment and asynchronous decision making

An ideal candidate has

  • Senior-level experience & familiarity with React
  • The ability to effectively drive towards a solution in a thoughtful and creative manner
  • The ability to work autonomously, iterate on solutions, and manage different contexts
  • Dealt with ambiguity and can balance building out multiple features at once without jeopardizing the quality of the code

Perks And Benefits Of Working With Us

  • Well-funded and proven startup with large ambitions, competitive salary and the upsides of pre-IPO equity packages.
  • Hopper offers employees enrollment to a Hopper sponsored Health Collective that includes options for basic medical and dental insurances, as well as options for deductibles.
  • Hopper offers private insurance coverage to supplement social security payments attributed to Accidental Death and Long term disability, including Excess and Gap insurances.
  • In lieu of a formal pension plan, Hopper will provide a cash allowance to put towards pension savings.
  • Please ask us about our very generous parental leave, much above industry standards!. Unlimited PTO.
  • Flexdesk coworking All Access Pass AND Work-from-home stipend.
  • Carrot Cash travel stipend.
  • Entrepreneurial culture where pushing limits and taking risks is everyday business.
  • Open communication with management and company leadership.
  • Small, dynamic teams = massive impact.

More About Hopper

At Hopper, we are on a mission to become the leading travel platform globally – powering Hopper’s mobile app, website and our B2B business, HTS (Hopper Technology Solutions). By leveraging massive amounts of data and advanced machine learning algorithms, Hopper combines its world-class travel agency offering with proprietary fintech products to bring transparency, flexibility and savings to travelers globally. We have developed several unique fintech solutions that address everything from pricing volatility to trip disruptions – helping people travel better and save more on their trips.

The Hopper platform serves hundreds of millions of travelers globally and continues to capture market share around the world. he Hopper app has been downloaded over 120 million times and has become largely popular among younger travelers – with 70% of its users being Gen Z and millennials.

While everyone knows us as the Gen Z and Millennial travel app, Hopper has evolved to become much more than that. In recent years, we’ve grown into a travel fintech provider, commerce platform, and global travel agency that powers some of the world’s largest brands.

Through HTS, our B2B division, the company supercharges its partners’ direct channels by integrating our fintech products on their sites or powering end-to-end travel portals. Today, our partners include leading travel brands like Capital One, Nubank, Air Canada, and many more.

Here are just a few stats that demonstrate the company’s recent growth:

  • Billions of dollars worth of travel and travel fintech are sold through Hopper and HTS’ channels every year.
  • Our fintech products – including Cancel for Any Reason and Flight Disruption Assistance – have exceptionally strong CSAT because the terms are always clear, and customers receive instant, no-questions-asked resolutions.
  • Almost 30% of our app customers purchase at least one fintech product when making a booking; and consumers are 1.6x more likely to repurchase if they add fintech to their booking vs if they booked just travel.

Given the success of its fintech products, Hopper launched a B2B initiative, HTS (Hopper Technology Solutions), which represents more than 75% of the business.

Through HTS, any travel provider (airlines, hotels, banks, travel agencies, etc.) can integrate and seamlessly distribute Hopper’s fintech or travel inventory on their direct channels. As its first HTS partnership, the company partnered with Capital One to co-develop Capital One Travel, a new travel portal designed specifically for cardholders. Other HTS partners include Air Canada, Uber, CommBank, Nubank, Flair Airlines and many more.

Hopper has been named the #1 most innovative company in travel by Fast Company Hopper has been downloaded over 120 million times and continues to have millions of new installs each month. Hopper is now the #3 largest online travel agencies in North America and 70% of our app customers are Gen-Z and millennials travelers.

Hopper has raised over $750 million USD of private capital and is backed by some of the largest institutional investors and banks in the world. HTS is primed to continue its growth as the leading travel ecommerce provider in a $1 trillion online shopping category. The Hopper app and website will also continue to be the preferred travel provider for Gen Z and Millennials..

Come take off with us!

companyDescription:
We are Uber. The go-getters. The kind of people who are relentless about our mission to help people go anywhere and get anything and earn their way. Movement is what we power. It’s our lifeblood. It runs through our veins. It’s what gets us out of bed each morning. It pushes us to constantly reimagine how we can move better. For you. For all the places you want to go. For all the things you want to get. For all the ways you want to earn. Across the entire world. In real time. At the incredible speed of now.

The idea for Uber was born on a snowy night in Paris in 2008, and ever since then our DNA of reimagination and reinvention carries on. We’ve grown into a global platform powering flexible earnings and the movement of people and things in ever expanding ways. We’ve gone from connecting rides on 4 wheels to 2 wheels to 18-wheel freight deliveries. From takeout meals to daily essentials to prescription drugs to just about anything you need at any time and earning your way. From drivers with background checks to real-time verification, safety is a top priority every single day. At Uber, the pursuit of reimagination is never finished, never stops, and is always just beginning.
descriptionHtml:
Role open for Amsterdam, Dubai, London or Paris.

About The Role

This role is part of the G-SPI (Global support for platform integrity) team and is focused on document operations. Earner identity needs to be verified before they can start earning on the Uber platform. This is done through collecting essential identity documents and verifying them against the legal policies. This is crucial for ensuring that Uber's doc processing operations remain compliant to the regulatory standards. EMEA has multiple different rules and regulations and they can differ widely country by country. Ensuring that these rules are upheld is imperative to ensure that Uber remains compliant with its licensing requirements to operate in the given country.

As part of the G-SPI Identity team your job will be to ensure that the doc processing program continuously evolves to meet the regional requirements and work closely to advocate for the changes across cross functional teams including Product, Policy, Operations, Vendor Operations etc.

What You'll Do

  • Partner with regional compliance and safety operations to stay on top of any regulatory changes that may impact our business
  • Oversee identity verification process by owning key scorecard KPIs on processing accuracy, processing speed, cost, process automation and fraud detection
  • Work cross functionally to kick off improvement and back to health plans when any KPIs under-perform
  • Own all communications to regional stakeholders and leadership on business health
  • Work closely with operations and product to identify and deploy automations
  • Conduct regular process deep-dives to ensure there are no gaps in the process
  • Build long term strategy for EMEA Identity based on regional inputs and priorities

Basic Qualifications

  • Minimum of 5 years of experience
  • Ability to operate in a fast paced environment
  • Ability to manage and influence multiple cross functional teams
  • Demonstrated experience in managing large scale projects
  • Ability to work independently with little supervision
  • Exceptional communication skills to work effectively with EMEA Ops and CommOps leadership
  • Previous experience of working across multiple geographies

Preferred Qualifications

  • Advanced data analytics skills including SQL
  • Previous experience working in a matrix organisation
  • Previous experience of working with Product and Engineering for solutions design

companyDescription:
Huawei is een toonaangevende internationale leverancier van informatie- en communicatietechnologie (ICT). We leveren geïntegreerde oplossingen in vier domeinen: telecomnetwerken, IT, smart devices en cloud. Huawei streeft ernaar om digitalisering naar iedere organisatie, huis en persoon te brengen en zo bij te dragen aan een volledig verbonden, digitale en intelligente wereld.

Bij Huawei is innovatie gericht op de wensen van onze klanten. Wij zijn een van de grootste investeerders in R&D ter wereld en focussen op technologische doorbraken die mensen en bedrijven vooruithelpen. 

Huawei heeft in Nederland 600 medewerkers in dienst die werkzaam zijn vanuit 3 kantoren in Amsterdam, Den Haag en Eindhoven. Wereldwijd heeft Huawei meer dan 180.000 werknemers in dienst. Het bedrijf is actief in meer dan 170 landen. Huawei is opgericht in 1987 en is een private onderneming die volledig eigendom is van de werknemers.
companySlogan: Voor een volledig verbonden, digitale en intelligente wereld
descriptionHtml:
About Huawei Petal Ads

Petal Ads is a smart marketing platform for Huawei devices. It provides marketing and traffic monetisation services for advertisers and publishers worldwide to help them achieve business growth and improve brand value. It does this by leveraging Huawei's "1+8+N" all-scenario ecosystem, Huawei apps' marketing capabilities, massive premium third-party traffic, and powerful ad technologies. Petal Ads has a global user base of more than 730 million monthly active users covering 220+ Global markets, while more than 60,000 apps worldwide have integrated Ads Kit. In addition, 20+ Huawei apps and 10+ mainstream ad formats are at users' disposal.

About the Job:

Huawei Ads is building the next-generation ad exchange (ADX) engine to power a sustainable and innovative computational advertising ecosystem. As a Computational Ads Bidding Expert, you will serve as a technical pioneer and thought partner within our global team.

In this role, you will not only design and optimise bidding strategies but also drive innovation, shape the technical roadmap, and collaborate across domains to influence the future of Huawei’s advertising technology stack. Your work will directly impact billion-scale business outcomes and help set industry benchmarks for smart bidding, auction mechanism design, and campaign optimisation.

Responsibility:

  • Technical Leadership & Framework Design
    • Co-Lead the design, implementation, and evolution of the bidding strategy framework for real-time bidding ads.
    • Collaborate with existing technical leads to define Huawei Ads’ long-term bidding strategy and ecosystem vision.
  • Innovation & Research Impact
    • Conduct research on next-generation auction mechanisms, game-theoretic approaches, and reinforcement learning for smart bidding.
    • Identify and drive forward-looking projects that can position Huawei Ads at the forefront of computational advertising.
    • Explore potential cross-team and cross-domain collaborations (e.g., recommendation, pricing, fraud detection, attribution).
  • Optimisation of Campaign & Ecosystem Performance
    • Develop advanced strategies for smart bidding, budget allocation/pacing, and bid landscaping, and campaign performance optimisation.
    • Solve complex challenges in budget fulfilment, cold start deployment, campaign stability, anti-fraud, and attribution.
  • Industry Thought Leadership
    • Stay ahead of the curve on bidding mechanisms and algorithms, integrating state-of-the-art research into production systems.
    • Publish and present research findings in top-tier journals, conferences, and industry forums.
    • Mentor engineers and data scientists, elevating the team’s technical capability.


Requirements:

  • Master’s or PhD in Computer Science, Statistics, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, or related fields.
  • Domain Expertise: Rich experience in computational advertising, particularly in bidding, reinforcement learning, auction mechanism design, or game theory.
  • Innovation Track Record: Proven ability to propose, design, and deliver next-generation bidding frameworks, with successful application experience in smart bidding, budget pacing, campaign stability, anti-fraud, and attribution.
  • Research Leadership: Strong academic background, with publications in top conferences/journals (e.g., KDD, NeurIPS, SIGIR, WWW, ICML) preferred.
  • Technical Foresight: Ability to rapidly understand and integrate emerging technologies into Huawei Ads’ bidding ecosystem.
  • Collaboration & Influence: Skilled at working with technical leads and global teams, aligning strategy and execution while driving innovation

descriptionHtml:
Jij zorgt ervoor dat alleen met integere klanten zaken wordt gedaan. Als ervaren CDD-analist lever jij een belangrijke bijdrage in het voorkomen van financieel-economische criminaliteit. Met jouw scherpe blik en kritische houding onderzoek je klantdossiers zorgvuldig en draag je bij aan een veilig financieel systeem. Zo maak je elke dag impact. Voor zowel de bank als voor onze maatschappij.

Omschrijving

CDD is nu, maar óók in de toekomst een belangrijk thema binnen de financiële wereld. Ontwikkelingen volgen elkaar in hoog tempo op; morgen ziet de wereld er weer anders uit dan vandaag.

  • Zorgdragen voor het actueel en compleet maken van klantdossiers binnen de afdeling.
  • Informatie verzamelen via deskresearch en klantcontact.
  • Risico's onderzoeken, analyseren en beoordelen, en op basis daarvan een compleet risicoprofiel van de klant opstellen.
  • Bij onduidelijkheden in het klantbeeld voer je (meestal telefonisch) uitvragen uit.
  • Je neemt verantwoordelijkheid voor de bevindingen van je onderzoek en neemt beslissingen over risico's en vervolgacties.

Profiel van kandidaat

Grondig analyseren, het belang van de klant en de bank afwegen en snel schakelen: daar ben jij goed in. Je bent een echte specialist op het gebied van Wwft en weet alles van klantintegriteit. Kritisch als je bent, weet je onjuistheden snel te signaleren en hoofd- en bijzaken te scheiden. Je schrijft kort en bondig, je werkt nauwkeurig, durft de knoop bij twijfel door te hakken en neemt verantwoordelijkheid voor je werk. Je voert klantgesprekken, ook bij weerstand, op een professionele manier met overtuigingskracht en inlevingsvermogen.

Daarnaast heb je:

  • Een hbo-diploma.
  • Minimaal 2 jaar ervaring als analist.
  • Een pré als je een specialisme hebt, zoals bijvoorbeeld PEP of complexe klantgroepen.
  • Affiniteit om minder ervaren analisten te coachen en op een hoger niveau te brengen.

Aanbod

Wij zetten in op ontwikkeling, dus je kan rekenen op een flinke carrièrelift! Zo bieden we je bijvoorbeeld een breed scala aan verdiepende en verbredende opleidingen, inclusief de nodige certificaten. Welke bij jou past, ligt aan je ambities. Je kunt rekenen op:

  • Een bruto maandsalaris tussen €3750 en €4700 (excl. 8% vakantiegeld), afhankelijk van ervaring.
  • Een bonusopportunity, successen moet je vieren.
  • Een vaste consultant die alles voor je regelt en met je meedenkt over je loopbaan.
  • 26 vakantiedagen.
  • Uitgebreide opleidings- en doorgroeimogelijkheden, onder andere via de Brunel Academy.
  • Een pensioenregeling en collectieve zorgverzekering.
  • Korting op sportscholen, culturele activiteiten en vitaliteitsprogramma's.

Over Brunel

Brunel levert flexibele en structurele (personeels) oplossingen aan verschillende klanten. Brunel Finance & Risk is gespecialiseerd in het detacheren van zowel junior professionals als ervaren vakspecialisten binnen de financiële dienstverlening. Bij Brunel krijg je de kans om jouw expertise in te zetten op maatschappelijk relevante opdrachten. Je werkt bij gerenommeerde banken en financiële instellingen, waar je direct bijdraagt aan de veiligheid van het financiële systeem. Samen bouwen we aan een veilige en eerlijke wereld.

companyDescription:
Adyen (AMS: ADYEN) is the financial technology platform of choice for leading companies. By providing end-to-end payments capabilities, data-driven insights, and financial products in a single global solution, Adyen helps businesses achieve their ambitions faster. With offices around the world, Adyen works with the likes of Meta, Uber, H&M, eBay, and Microsoft.

For support visit: https://support.adyen.com
companySlogan: Meet the financial technology platform helping the world’s leading businesses achieve their ambitions faster.
descriptionHtml:
This is Adyen

Adyen is the financial technology platform of choice for leading businesses, providing payments, data, and financial products in a single solution for global customers like Meta, Uber, and H&M. At Adyen, everything we do is engineered for ambition. We create an environment with opportunities for our people to succeed, backed by a culture that encourages ownership and provides the support to truly own your career. We are motivated individuals who tackle unique technical challenges at scale and solve them as a team, delivering innovative and ethical solutions that help businesses achieve their ambitions faster.

About The Role

We are seeking a highly skilled and enthusiastic Staff Engineer with a strong background in Software Engineering and hands-on experience in Machine Learning (ML) applications. In this role, you will play a critical part in designing, building, and scaling systems that leverage ML to solve real-world business challenges.

You are someone who is curious about new technologies, eager to learn, and passionate about using technology as a practical tool to drive meaningful business impact. You enjoy solving complex problems and thrive in environments where innovation, continuous learning, and collaboration are key.

The Opportunity

Adyen is building out its capabilities in data-driven risk management to combat financial crime across its platform. We operate at a massive global scale, enabling businesses around the world to accept payments, issue cards, and embed financial products, helping millions of business owners around the globe do business with less friction. While we have foundational elements in place, we have recently shifted our strategy to take a more holistic approach to proactively detect and mitigate financial crime.

Key Responsibilities

  • Design and develop robust, scalable software systems that integrate Machine Learning models into production environments.
  • Collaborate closely with product managers, data scientists, and business stakeholders to understand business problems and translate them into technical solutions.
  • Evaluate new technologies, frameworks, and tools, and drive their adoption where appropriate to solve real business challenges.
  • Mentor and guide junior engineers and peers through technical leadership and knowledge sharing.
  • Advocate for best practices in software engineering, ML operations (MLOps), and system architecture.
  • Continuously learn and stay up-to-date with advancements in software engineering, infrastructure, and AI technologies.
  • Lead technical design discussions and contribute to the strategic direction of the technology roadmap.
  • Close cross functional collaboration with different, non-technical functions like Account Management, Compliance, Operations etc.

Requirements

  • At least 10-12 years of extensive industry experience in Software Engineering and Machine learning, including system design, architecture, and development.
  • Experience with scalable, reliable and low latency systems.
  • Proven experience building, deploying, and scaling Machine Learning applications in production environments.
  • Strong programming skills in languages such as Python and Java.
  • Experience working with and using SQL and NoSQL Databases.
  • Knowledge of ML frameworks and platforms like PyTorch.
  • Deep curiosity and drive to continually learn new technologies and techniques.
  • Familiarity with data engineering concepts, big data tools (Spark, Kafka), and scalable data architectures.
  • Passion for applying technology to solve real business problems in a pragmatic and impactful way.
  • A good product sense and the ability to understand how research can translate into valuable applications.
  • Excellent communication skills and a collaborative mindset.

Why Adyen?

This is an exceptional opportunity to join a solid, established company with a startup mindset, characterized by small teams, direct communication, and work on important challenges. You’ll have direct access to massive global datasets (e.g., payments, identity data) and the ability to see your work have an immediate impact at scale. We offer an environment of ownership and speed, where a focused research team can make a significant difference. You will be at the forefront of bridging AI and fintech, shaping how these two critical areas intersect. We are looking for individuals who are eager to stay connected to the edge of innovation while ensuring we deliver practical value to our global platform.

About The Team

We work in the financial Crime and Fraud department. As a financial institute, we provide products to store and move finances. This comes at a risk. Fraudsters and criminals can misuse our platform to do financial crime like money laundering, and fraud like taking funds that do not belong to them.

We need to be one step ahead of the fraudsters and we are also liable to report any detection of financial crime.We leverage our huge amount of data to identify actors using our platform, mitigate crime and catch fraud cases without creating friction for our genuine customers. In order to do this in a scalable and reliable manner, we have teams dedicated to figuring out the customer behind any event that goes through Adyen, do risk assessment, and make good judgement in real time as well as after the event has taken place.

Day to day we work with Java, Postgres, Cassandra, Kafka, RabbitMQ, Big Data Platform, Machine Learning to equip ourselves with the right tools.

Our Diversity, Equity and Inclusion commitments

Our unique approach is a product of our diverse perspectives. This diversity of backgrounds and cultures is essential in helping us maintain our momentum. Our business and technical challenges are unique, and we need as many different voices as possible to join us in solving them - voices like yours. No matter who you are or where you’re from, we welcome you to be your true self at Adyen.

Studies show that women and members of underrepresented communities apply for jobs only if they meet 100% of the qualifications. Does this sound like you? If so, Adyen encourages you to reconsider and apply. We look forward to your application!

What’s next?

Ensuring a smooth and enjoyable candidate experience is critical for us. We aim to get back to you regarding your application within 5 business days. Our interview process tends to take about 4 weeks to complete, but may fluctuate depending on the role. Learn more about our hiring process here. Don’t be afraid to let us know if you need more flexibility.

This role is based out of our Amsterdam office. We are an office-first company and value in-person collaboration; we do not offer remote-only roles.

companyDescription:
Employers, hiring managers, recruiters. Everyone has one thing on their mind. Finding talented people. But… everyone's looking in the same places. At the same time. In the same tiring way.

Traditional job advertising always targets the same people. The ones that are actively looking for a new job. The only thing is; the best talent is often taken. But just because they're not searching for a new job, doesn't mean they're not looking for one.

What if you knew who's eager to switch jobs before they start looking?

Welcome to Jobster; the world’s first predictive job advertising platform. 
Open for early access registrations now.

Reach active and passive job seekers on jobsites and beyond using real-time optimised campaigns in a cost-efficient manner. That’s Jobster in one sentence. 

- AI-driven candidate matching
- Real time bidding
- Programmatic distribution

Do you want to learn more about Jobster? 
Request early access now at Jobster.com.

Jobster. Predictive Job Advertising. Finally.
companySlogan: The world’s first predictive job advertising platform. Find talent before they start looking for a job.
descriptionHtml:
Proficiency in Dutch, both spoken and written, is necessary.

Wat je bij ons gaat doen

In het Traineeship Fraude Analist (9 tot 12 maanden) leer je hoe je fraude opspoort binnen de wereld van verzekeringen. Denk aan onterecht geclaimde schades, vervalste documenten of verhalen die nét niet kloppen. Je start in een algemene opdracht bij een verzekeraar of financiële instelling om de sector goed te leren kennen. Ondertussen volg je trainingen, workshops en haal je je Wft-certificaten.

Je leert hoe fraudeonderzoek werkt: hoe signalen worden herkend, hoe je klantdossiers onderzoekt en hoe je voorkomt dat mensen misbruik maken van de verzekering. Je ontwikkelt analytisch vermogen én mensenkennis, want niet alles staat zwart op wit. Na afronding van het traineeship kun je doorgroeien richting functies als fraudeonderzoeker, claimbeoordelaar of compliance medewerker.

Het traineeship in het kort:


  • Start in een algemene rol binnen een verzekeraar of financiële organisatie
  • Leer hoe je fraude herkent, onderzoekt en documenteert
  • Volg trainingen en workshops over verzekeringsproducten en fraude-indicatoren
  • Behaal je Wft-certificaten, zoals Wft Basis
  • Leg een sterke basis voor je toekomst in finance en groei door naar een specialistische of senior rol.


Zo zijn wij een match

Ben jij nieuwsgierig en wil je altijd blijven leren? Dan ben jij een echte Weltenaar. Voor dit traineeship maakt je achtergrond niet uit; we gaan samen op zoek naar de beste versie van jezelf. Wij zorgen ervoor dat jij helemaal klaargestoomd wordt om te starten in de financiële wereld.

Herken jij jezelf in onderstaande punten?


  • Je bent (bijna) klaar met je hbo- of wo-studie en kunt 32-40 uur per week werken.
  • Jij zet je ontwikkeling op de eerste plaats. Je vindt het belangrijk om met coaching en opleidingen je ambities en doelen te ontdekken.
  • Je bent bereid om naar de Randstad te reizen (daar zitten onze opdrachtgevers), ook al kun je deels hybride werken.


Hier kom je terecht

Als trainee kom je in dienst bij Welten. Je krijgt een contract, een goed salaris en toegang tot opleidingen, coaching en een groot netwerk. Vanuit Welten word je gedetacheerd naar een verzekeraar of financiële instelling, waar je meewerkt aan echte dossiers en stap voor stap leert hoe fraudeonderzoek in de praktijk werkt.

Je start in een algemene rol binnen de verzekeringsbranche, zodat je goed begrijpt hoe processen en producten werken. Daarna stroom je door naar opdrachten waar verzekeringsfraude centraal staat. Denk aan schadeclaims analyseren, klantdata controleren of signalen van misbruik rapporteren. Je werkt in een team van ervaren collega’s, met ondersteuning van Welten op de achtergrond.

Detachering betekent: werken bij grote organisaties, zonder telkens opnieuw te hoeven solliciteren. Jij focust je op het werk en de inhoud, wij regelen de rest.

Wij zorgen ervoor dat jij helemaal klaargestoomd wordt om te starten in de financiële wereld.Herken jij jezelf in onderstaande punten?Je bent (bijna) klaar met je hbo- of wo-studie en kunt 32-40 uur per week werken.Jij zet je ontwikkeling op de eerste plaats. Je vindt het belangrijk om met coaching en opleidingen je ambities en doelen te ontdekken.Je bent bereid om naar de Randstad te reizen (daar zitten onze opdrachtgevers), ook al kun je deels hybride werken.Hier kom je terechtAls trainee kom je in dienst bij Welten. Je krijgt een contract, een goed salaris en toegang tot opleidingen, coaching en een groot netwerk. Vanuit Welten word je gedetacheerd naar een verzekeraar of financiële instelling, waar je meewerkt aan echte dossiers en stap voor stap leert hoe fraudeonderzoek in de praktijk werkt.Je start in een algemene rol binnen de verzekeringsbranche, zodat je goed begrijpt hoe processen en producten werken. Daarna stroom je door naar opdrachten waar verzekeringsfraude centraal staat. Denk aan schadeclaims analyseren, klantdata controleren of signalen van misbruik rapporteren. Je werkt in een team van ervaren collega’s, met ondersteuning van Welten op de achtergrond.Detachering betekent: werken bij grote organisaties, zonder telkens opnieuw te hoeven solliciteren. Jij focust je op het werk en de inhoud, wij regelen de rest.#Jobster
title: Traineeship Fraude Analist (Dutch speaking only) - Welten

companyDescription: We use AI to understand human ability and match talent with the opportunities they're best suited for.
companySlogan: We use AI to understand human ability and match talent with the opportunities they're best suited for.
descriptionHtml:
Mercor is hiring experienced Accounting and Audit professionals to support a variety of high-impact projects with leading AI labs and research organizations. Freelancers will leverage their financial expertise to help evaluate, refine, and verify AI outputs in areas such as accounting standards, audit practices, financial reporting, compliance, and risk assessment.

This is a unique opportunity to apply your professional accounting and audit skills toward shaping the next generation of intelligent systems used in finance and compliance.


Key Responsibilities

  • Review and refine AI-generated accounting analyses, audit reports, and financial statements
  • Validate AI outputs for compliance with GAAP, IFRS, and other relevant standards
  • Provide structured feedback on clarity, accuracy, and adherence to accounting principles
  • Tag and organize content by accounting topic, industry sector, or complexity level
  • Support benchmarking efforts to assess AI model capabilities in financial domains


Ideal Qualifications

  • 2+ years of professional accounting experience, ideally at top-tier public accounting firms (e.g., Big Four – Deloitte, PwC, EY, KPMG), Fortune 500 corporate finance/accounting departments, or in specialized contexts such as government, nonprofit/fund, forensic, or international/cross-border accounting.
  • Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related quantitative field. A Master’s degree in Accounting or an MBA with an accounting concentration is a plus.
  • Professional certifications such as CPA, CA, CMA, or ACCA are highly valued.
  • Strong technical accounting proficiency, including knowledge of GAAP, IFRS, and other relevant reporting/regulatory frameworks across financial, managerial, and cost accounting domains.
  • Expertise in core accounting processes, such as financial reporting, budgeting, tax compliance, month-end close, account reconciliations, revenue recognition, lease accounting, consolidations, and internal controls.
  • Experience in specialized/applied areas such as forensic accounting (fraud detection, investigations), government accounting (public sector compliance), nonprofit/fund accounting (donor tracking, grant reporting), or cross-border accounting (GAAP vs. IFRS, transfer pricing, foreign exchange).
  • Excellent analytical, documentation, and communication skills, with the ability to distill complex accounting concepts into clear, actionable guidance for both technical and non-technical stakeholders.


Project Timeline

  • Start Date: Immediate
  • Duration: 1–2 months
  • Commitment: Part-time (15–25 hours/week, with flexibility up to 40 hours/week)
  • Schedule: Fully remote and asynchronous – flexible working hours


Compensation & Contract

  • Competitive hourly rate based on experience & geographic location ($40–$90 USD/hr)
  • Independent contractor
  • Daily payment via Stripe Connect


Application & Onboarding Process

  • Upload your resume
  • AI interview: A short, 15-minute conversational session to understand your background, experience, and interest in the role
  • Follow-up communication within a few days with next steps and onboarding details


About Mercor

Mercor is a San Francisco-based company specializing in connecting elite professionals with cutting-edge AI initiatives. Our investors include Benchmark, General Catalyst, Adam D’Angelo, Larry Summers, and Jack Dorsey. Thousands of professionals across finance, engineering, research, and creative fields have partnered with Mercor on frontier projects shaping the future of AI.


Apply today and leverage your accounting and audit expertise to help build the future of AI-driven financial workflows!

companyDescription: Gemeente Gooise Meren biedt medewerkers waardevol werk met maatschappelijke invloed in het Gooi. We willen het verschil maken. Wij zijn hartelijk, betrouwbaar en ondernemend in ons doen en denken. Samen met onze inwoners, ondernemers en partners maken we het mogelijk dat onze gemeente een aantrekkelijke woon- en werkomgeving blijft.
descriptionHtml:
We zijn op zoek naar een sociaal rechercheur met een sterk rechtvaardigheidsgevoel en een goed ontwikkelde fraude-radar. Iemand die met zijn zorgvuldige onderzoeksvaardigheden, goede gesprekstechnieken en heldere manier van rapporteren wil bijdragen aan een rechtvaardige samenleving.


Sta jij stevig in je schoenen, durf je keuzes te maken en werk je het best in een omgeving waar geen dag hetzelfde is? Ben je daarnaast nog een professional die vol overtuiging, creativiteit en integriteit werkt aan een eerlijke verdeling van publieke middelen? Dan willen we graag met jou in gesprek.


Wat ga je doen

Als sociaal rechercheur zorg jij ervoor dat regels worden nageleefd en publieke middelen terechtkomen waar ze horen. Je duikt diep in dossiers, volgt je intuïtie en laat je niet afschrikken door een complex verhaal. Of het nu gaat om de Participatiewet, de Wet Maatschappelijke Ondersteuning of de Jeugdwet, jij weet wat er speelt en pakt door.


Je werkt nauw samen met je collega’s en met partners zoals consulenten, politie en justitie. Samen zorgen jullie voor een stevige aanpak van fraude.


Wie jij bent

Jij bent geen type dat achterover leunt. Jij kunt goed inschatten, stelt de juiste vragen en laat je niet snel van je stuk brengen. Je bent sociaal en scherp, weet wanneer je moet doorpakken en wanneer je moet luisteren.


Verder:

  • Zeg je waar het op staat — en kun je tegen een stootje
  • Heb je een oog voor detail en weet je de onderste steen boven te krijgen
  • Kun je zelfstandig opereren, en werk je ook graag samen
  • Breng je humor mee naar het team en draag je bij aan een fijne werksfeer
  • Ben je sociaal intelligent en pas je je communicatie moeiteloos aan je gesprekspartner aan


Wat breng je mee

  • Hbo werk- en denkniveau, bij voorkeur in een sociaaljuridische richting of politieopleiding
  • Je hebt aantoonbare affiniteit en/of ervaring met het doen van recherchematige onderzoeken
  • Je bent gewend met sociale wet- en regelgeving te werken, zoals bijvoorbeeld de Participatiewet, de Jeugdwet of de Wet Maatschappelijke Ondersteuning
  • Ervaring met het uitvoeren van onderzoeken en opstellen van rapportages en of processen verbaal
  • In het bezit van een rijbewijs B
  • Bereidheid om relevante opleidingen te volgen


Wat wij jou bieden

  • Een jaarcontract voor 36 uur per week, met uitzicht op een vast dienstverband
  • Een salaris tot 5.519 bruto per maand (aanloopschaal 9 tot schaal 10 bij 36 uur, per 1 oktober 2025, conform de CAO Gemeenten). De startdatum is in overleg en zal tussen 1 november 2025 en 1 januari 2026 zijn.
  • Een Individueel Keuze Budget (IKB) van 18,65% dat je flexibel kunt inzetten
  • Reiskostenvergoeding en/of vergoeding voor thuiswerken (100% OV-vergoeding)
  • Een sociale werkomgeving met volop ontwikkelmogelijkheden


Over de Sociale Recherche

Je valt binnen deze functie onder de Sociale Recherche Gooi en Omstreken. Dit is een samenwerkingsverband van 10 gemeenten. De kerntaak van een sociaal rechercheur bestaat uit het instellen van straf- of bestuursrechtelijke onderzoeken naar fraude binnen de Participatiewet, de Wet Maatschappelijke Ondersteuning en de Jeugdwet en het adviseren en ondersteunen van deze gemeenten


De Sociale Recherche is een onderdeel van de Uitvoeringsdienst Sociaal Domein (USD) en bestaat uit een betrokken team van 4 sociaal rechercheurs. Samen ben je verantwoordelijk voor het eindresultaat!


Solliciteren?

Denk jij na het lezen: dit is precies waar ik goed in ben? Mooi. Dan willen we jou graag leren kennen. Reageer uiterlijk 21 september 2025 via ons online sollicitatieformulier.


Wil je eerst meer weten? Neem contact op met de medewerkers van de Sociale Recherche: sr@gooisemeren.nl of telefoonnummer: 035207603


Het opvragen van referenties en/of LinkedIn check kan onderdeel zijn van de selectieprocedure. Het opvragen van een Verklaring Omtrent Gedrag (VOG) is een vast onderdeel van de selectieprocedure.


Gemeente Gooise Meren is een organisatie die ruimte biedt aan iedereen. Wij streven naar een diverse organisatie en creëren een cultuur waarbinnen iedereen zichzelf kan zijn.

descriptionHtml:
Heb jij een scherp oog voor risico's, gevoel voor integriteit én al de nodige ervaring met klantonderzoek? Dan ben jij de professional die we zoeken om onze opdrachtgevers - grote banken en financiële instellingen - te ondersteunen bij het waarborgen van hun compliance.

Omschrijving

Als Medior CDD/KYC Analist werk je aan klantonderzoeken binnen het zakelijk en/of particuliere domein. Je onderzoekt klantstructuren, herkomst van vermogen, UBO's en risicoprofielen. Daarbij kijk je verder dan standaarddocumentatie en gebruik je je analytisch vermogen om verbanden te leggen. Complexe bedrijfsstructuren of internationale geldstromen? Geen probleem voor jou - jij weet waar je moet zoeken.

  • Uitvoeren van (periodieke) CDD/KYC-onderzoeken op nieuwe en bestaande klanten
  • Signaleren van integriteitsrisico's en verdachte transacties
  • Analyseren van complexe klantstructuren, (internationale) holdings en trustconstructies
  • Opstellen van heldere analyses en onderbouwde risico-indicaties
  • Samenwerken met collega-analisten, compliance officers en andere stakeholders

Profiel van kandidaat

  • Minimaal 2 - 4 jaar relevante werkervaring als CDD of KYC Analist
  • Je beschikt over minimaal een hbo-diploma in criminologie, rechten, bedrijfskunde, economie of een vergelijkbare richting.
  • Je werkt nauwkeurig, kritisch en weet hoofd- en bijzaken goed te scheiden
  • Goede beheersing van de Nederlandse en Engelse taal
  • Ervaring met zakelijk klantonderzoek is een sterke pré
  • Ervaring met complexe (internationale) structuren is een pré

Aanbod

Bij Brunel sta jij als professional centraal. Je werkt via ons voor toonaangevende banken of financiële instellingen, met volop aandacht voor jouw ontwikkeling.

  • Een salaris tussen de €3.800 en €4.700 bruto per maand (o.b.v. 40 uur)
  • Een contract voor 32 tot 40 uur per week
  • Daarnaast, want daar blijft het niet bij, stellen we diverse opleidingsmogelijkheden aan je voor, waardoor jij je zowel op zakelijk als op persoonlijk vlak kunt blijven ontwikkelen.
  • Loopbaanbegeleiding door een vaste consultant
  • De mogelijkheid om hybride te werken
  • Uitstekende secundaire arbeidsvoorwaarden, zoals pensioenregeling, bonusregeling en reiskostenvergoeding

Over Brunel

Brunel levert flexibele en structurele (personeels)oplossingen voor klanten. Dit doen we binnen de vakgebieden Engineering, Finance & Risk, IT, Legal en Marketing & Communicatie.We matchen de juiste specialisten met de uitdagende projecten van onze opdrachtgevers.We bestaan al sinds 1975, en blijven ondernemend. Wij maken impact op maatschappelijke thema's en technologische ontwikkelingen, zoals de energietransitie, fraudebestrijding, digitalisering en mobiliteitsuitdagingen. Brunel is uitgegroeid tot een wereldwijde organisatie met ruim 12.000 medewerkers in 45 landen.
